description: MCP server wrapping Gemini CLI: query, review, search, structured output, and diff assessment.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.hampsterx/gemini-mcp-bridge

environmentVariables.description: Path to the gemini CLI binary. Defaults to 'gemini' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_CLI_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Model to use when the primary model hits a quota or availability error.
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_FALLBACK_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Minimum milliseconds between consecutive CLI spawns, used to avoid rate-limit bursts.
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_MIN_INVOCATION_GAP_MS

environmentVariables.description: Upper bound of random jitter added to each CLI spawn to spread load.
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_SPAWN_JITTER_MAX_MS

environmentVariables.description: API key for Gemini. Alternative to GOOGLE_API_KEY or OAuth login.
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Google API key for Gemini. Alternative to GEMINI_API_KEY or OAuth login.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
